Bash(mv D:/githubworkspace/skills/00-overview.md D:/githubworkspace/skills/.claude/00-overview.md && mv D:/githubworkspace/skills/01-init-repo.md D:/githubworkspace/skills/.claude/01-init-repo.md && mv D:/githubworkspace/skills/02-add-skills.md D:/githubworkspace/skills/.claude/02-add-skills.md && mv D:/githubworkspace/skills/03-maintenance.md D:/githubworkspace/skills/.claude/03-maintenance.md && mv D:/githubworkspace/skills/04-scan-and-classify.md D:/githubworkspace/skills/.claude/04-scan-and-classify.md && echo "Done")

Bash(cd D:/githubworkspace/skills && py -3 -c "
import json

with open\('catalog.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

to_move = {'agent-reach', 'agent-memory', 'agent-team-orchestration', 'mcp-builder', 'skill-creator'}

for skill in data['skills']:
    if skill['name'] in to_move:
        skill['category'] = 'ai-agent'
        skill['path'] = skill['path'].replace\('skills/devops/', 'skills/ai-agent/'\)

with open\('catalog.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)

moved = [s['name'] for s in data['skills'] if s['category'] == 'ai-agent']
devops = [s['name'] for s in data['skills'] if s['category'] == 'devops']
print\('ai-agent:', moved\)
print\('devops:', devops\)
")
